title: Pixelmon Economy Bridge
description: Syncs PixelmonMod's economy system with Bukkit/Spigot's!
body:
## **Pixelmon Economy Bridge - syncs Pixelmon Reforged's economy system with Bukkit/Spigot's!**
 
*The Pixelmon Economy Bridge seamlessly syncs Pixelmon's PokéDollars currency with Bukkit/Spigot's Vault-based currencies! When using a Vault-based currency plugin such as CMI or EssentialsX to give a specified player money, Pixelmon Economy Bridge allows that money to be used by Pixelmon shopkeepers or third-party mods using the Pixelmon economy system whilst still being usable by Bukkit/Spigot plugins. Applications of PokéDollars from shopkeepers, NPC trainers, moves, commands or third-party mods will also be usable by your Vault-based Bukkit/Spigot plugins! Regardless of which currency you modify, Pixelmon or Bukkit/Spigot, it'll automatically sync or appear as one!*

Comparing with other Pixelmon Economy Bridges, this one offers increased performance through asynchronous execution, doesn't save unnecessary data, and doesn't use additional resources that it doesn't require!

#### Supported Economy plugins:
- CMI
- EssentialsX
 

#### Installation:
- Drag and drop the '.jar' file into your server's '/plugins' directory!
Reboot the server!
- Your Pixelmon and Vault-based economies will now be syncing!
 

Made for [Pixelmon Reforged](https://reforged.gg/).


For help, and to view my other available mods/plugins, feel free to [join Discord here](https://discord.gg/4S7NcdkYRx)!
